name: xdoc-translation
description: Document and text translation API skill powered by Xdoc. Translate documents (docx, pdf, pptx, xlsx, etc.) and text between 50+ languages with support for glossaries and translation memory.

required_env_vars.name: XDOC_API_KEY
required_env_vars.description: Your Xdoc API key for authentication. Obtain from https://translation.x-doc.ai/ → User → API Management → My API
